lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition and shows no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order.
Mint condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several dents. The interior is heavily worn with visible damage to the upholstery. The engine and transmission require mechanical attention.

Step into luxury with this stunning, showroom-quality vehicle! It has been meticulously maintained and is in truly mint condition, both inside and out. You won't find a single flaw on this beauty—it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been reliably maintained. The exterior looks great but shows some typical signs of use, including a few small door dings and minor surface scratches on the hood. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-kept, though there is some light wear on the driver’s seat bolster. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and has a solid service history. It’s a dependable car that’s ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good, reliable condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior shows beautifully with a glossy finish, though there are minor signs of regular use such as a few small stone chips on the hood and light surface scratches near the door handles. The interior is clean and well-preserved; the upholstery is free of rips or tears, though the driver's seat shows some light creasing consistent with its age. Mechanically, the car is solid—it starts reliably, idles smoothly, and handles well on the road. All electronic components, including the climate control and audio system, are fully operational. It has a consistent service history, and while it is not in showroom condition, it is a sturdy and attractive vehicle that is ready for daily use without any immediate needs.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a sophisticated driving experience. Rigorously inspected to ensure dependable performance, this automobile stands as a testament to quality engineering and diligent ownership.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for any adventure? I’m parting ways with this beauty, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in great shape, super dependable, and has been really well-loved. Whether you're commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car is ready to hit the road with you. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how smooth it feels!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with high-pressure double VANOS and independent throttle bodies. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from recent subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings. Suspension geometry is dialed in with upgraded coilovers, ensuring neutral handling and high-speed stability. While showing honest patina consistent with a well-loved enthusiast car, the mechanical vitals—including rod bearings and valve clearances—have been meticulously maintained. A visceral, high-revving machine ready for the backroads.
Used car in good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance history included.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes an excellent balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic wear that does not detract from its striking presence on the road. Inside, the cabin remains remarkably clean and smoke-free, with the upholstery showing minimal signs of use and all electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a consistent service history and recent preventative maintenance. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and confident braking. Whether you are looking for a reliable commuter or a comfortable weekend cruiser, this car has been cared for with pride and is ready for its next owner to drive away today.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. A distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable and sophisticated automotive investment.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which represents a premier balance of performance and enduring value. Subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, this motorcar exhibits mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic profile consistent with high standards of ownership. The interior remains remarkably preserved, reflecting a history of diligent care. This offering provides a distinguished driving experience for the discerning professional seeking reliability without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been an absolute joy to drive! She’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved, making her the perfect companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. Everything runs smoothly, and the interior is looking great. I'm sad to see her go, but I know she'll make her next owner very happy! Come take her for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced VANOS system. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been strategically upgraded with subframe reinforcement plates and a Bilstein PSS10 coilover kit, significantly improving torsional rigidity and damping response. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a cooling system overhaul with a high-flow aluminum radiator. While showing minor interior patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical synchronization and throttle mapping remain exceptionally sharp for spirited performance.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance records available. Fully functional.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that perfectly balances performance with everyday comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows the expected minor cosmetic character marks from careful road use, such as a few light rock chips on the front fascia. Inside, you’ll find a pristine cabin environment; the leather seats remain supple with only light softening on the driver-side bolster, and all electronics—including the premium audio system, sunroof, and dual-zone climate control—function exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready. It boasts a complete service history, featuring a recent comprehensive inspection, fresh fluids, and tires with significant tread remaining. The engine pulls smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision, reflecting its history of responsible ownership. It has been garage-kept by a non-smoker and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately with no upcoming maintenance required.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it offers a superior synthesis of reliable performance and long-term value. Each system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and driver comfort.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This specimen has been maintained to an exacting standard, exhibiting a harmonious balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a comprehensive professional assessment, it stands as a testament to diligent ownership and consistent performance. We invite you to acquire a machine that delivers both prestige and dependable utility.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride, and she’s still got so much life left in her! It’s been well-loved and runs beautifully—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip. It’s in solid shape and looking for a new owner who will enjoy it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Power is delivered via a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis has been maintained for structural integrity, with recent attention to the VANOS system and subframe bushings to ensure peak mechanical performance. Equipped with staggered 18-inch Style 67 wheels and factory-tuned suspension, this vehicle offers the linear power delivery and balanced handling characteristics quintessential to the M-division. A mechanically sound, well-sorted machine ready for the open road.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and pride of ownership. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, showing only the minor, expected road wear consistent with a well-maintained car of its age. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free, featuring upholstery that remains firm and supportive with no major blemishes. All electronic features, including the climate control and infotainment system, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced regularly, starts instantly, and delivers a smooth, confident ride with precise handling and strong braking. It is a reliable, attractive choice for anyone seeking a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This vehicle represents a superior balance of proven performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience underpinned by mechanical integrity. We invite discerning buyers to inspect this exceptional example of automotive engineering, which stands as a testament to diligent ownership.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and aesthetic integrity. This unit has undergone a thorough multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical reliability and interior comfort. Offering a balanced synthesis of durability and refined styling, it represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a turnkey automotive solution.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for me. If you’re looking for a solid car that’s been well-loved and is ready to hit the road with its next owner, this is the one! It drives like a dream and is just waiting for some new adventures. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS, delivering linear power up to an 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual, the drivetrain is robust, benefiting from a recent subframe reinforcement and VANOS overhaul. The chassis remains taut with a factory M Variable Differential Lock providing exceptional traction. Mechanically sound with a documented service history, this driver-focused example offers pure analog feedback and balanced handling dynamics.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Runs smooth. Title in hand.

This 2018 Lexus RX 350 presents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking luxury and long-term reliability. The Obsidian black exterior maintains a deep, reflective luster, showing only the minor, inevitable road wear consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the Parchment leather interior is remarkably clean and supple, featuring a smoke-free environment and pristine carpets. All technological amenities, including the intuitive navigation system and heated/ventilated seats, function perfectly. Under the hood, the V6 engine runs smoothly, backed by a comprehensive service history that confirms it has been maintained strictly according to manufacturer recommendations. The tires possess significant tread depth, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This vehicle offers a quiet, composed ride and is fully prepared for its next chapter without any immediate maintenance requirements.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and reliable engineering. This unit remains in commendable condition, offering a balanced synergy of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it stands ready for immediate delivery, representing a sophisticated acquisition for those seeking dependable quality without compromise.
